name: Trainual Business Playbook API
what_it_does: Trainual REST API for business playbook and standard operating procedure (SOP) platform. Enables AI agents to manage users and subjects, track training assignments and completions, retrieve test scores and compliance data, and integrate Trainual into HRIS and onboarding workflows. Trainual is targeted at SMBs wanting to document and train on SOPs.
use_cases: Provisioning new employee accounts from HR onboarding agents
Assigning training subjects and tracking completions from compliance agents
Retrieving test scores and SOP acknowledgements from operations agents
Integrating Trainual completion data into HRIS and payroll workflow agents
not_for: Large enterprise LMS needs (Trainual targets SMB)
best_when: An SMB using Trainual to document SOPs and train employees wants AI agents to automate onboarding assignment and track SOP compliance.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee training and SOP acknowledgement records are personal data. Handle per employment law.

auth.notes: Trainual API uses API key authentication as Bearer token. Account-level API key from Trainual account settings.

pricing.paid_tiers: Train and Scale plans based on team size
pricing.notes: SMB-focused pricing. Affordable per-team pricing model. API available on all plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee SOP acknowledgement and training records are personal data
No public MCP server — REST API with Bearer token auth
No webhooks — must poll API for completion status changes
Trainual API is less mature than enterprise LMS alternatives
US-only data residency — EU companies must assess compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee training and SOP acknowledgement data. SOC2. Bearer token auth. US data residency only.

security_score_components.security_notes: SOP and training acknowledgement data. SOC2. Bearer token auth. US-only.
